auth.taglineBody: People, absences, time tracking, performance, and recruiting – in one place, clear and fast.

meta.title: Coworkee — The HR platform for your whole team
meta.description: Employee management, absences, time tracking, documents, performance, and recruiting in one platform.

hero.title: The HR platform for your whole team.
hero.subtitle: People, absences, time tracking, documents, performance, and recruiting — in one system, instead of ten tabs.
hero.screenshotAlt: Coworkee dashboard with an overview of team, absences, and tasks

modules.heading: Everything HR needs.
modules.subheading: Nine modules, one platform. No more piecing things together from tools that don't talk to each other.

employees.title: Employee management & org chart
employees.body: All core data and reporting lines at a glance — always up to date.

absences.title: Absence & vacation
absences.body: Requests, approval workflow, and remaining leave calculated automatically.

time.title: Time tracking
time.body: Log and analyze working hours, without the spreadsheet chaos.

documents.title: Documents
documents.body: Store contracts and certificates securely, released role by role.

onboarding.title: Onboarding checklists
onboarding.body: Bring new team members up to speed, structured and friction-free.

performance.title: Performance
performance.body: Set goals, run reviews, and make progress visible.

analytics.title: Analytics & reporting
analytics.body: Headcount, turnover, and absences as KPIs and charts.

recruiting.title: Recruiting
recruiting.body: Post openings and move applications through a Kanban pipeline.

news.title: News & notifications
news.body: Announcements and reminders reach the team wherever they look.

spotlights.heading: Built to make HR work enjoyable again.

analytics.title: Decisions based on numbers, not gut feeling.
analytics.body: Headcount trends, contract types, new hires, and turnover in real-time dashboards — instead of scattered spreadsheets.
analytics.alt: Coworkee analytics dashboard with KPI tiles and charts

orgChart.title: Your company's structure, instantly clear.
orgChart.body: Reporting lines, teams, and open positions as an interactive org tree — instead of outdated slide decks.
bullets: Always in sync with the employee record
orgChart.alt: Coworkee org chart with the company's reporting lines

recruiting.title: From job profile to offer — one pipeline.
recruiting.body: Publish openings and drag applications through every stage on a Kanban board, without losing track.
recruiting.alt: Coworkee recruiting pipeline as a Kanban board

absences.title: Leave requests nobody emails around anymore.
absences.body: Remaining leave, requests, and approvals in one place — transparent for employees and managers alike.
absences.alt: Coworkee absence overview with leave balances

employees.title: Every colleague — searchable in seconds.
employees.body: One central directory with filtering and search replaces scattered contact lists and outdated wikis.
bullets: Full-text search across the whole workforce
Filter by team, location, and role
Jump straight to the employee record
employees.alt: Coworkee employee directory as a searchable table

darkMode.heading: Light or dark — your team decides.
darkMode.body: Everyone picks their preferred theme themselves. Coworkee looks good either way.

hosting.heading: Self-host or let us host it — your call.
hosting.subheading: Coworkee runs anywhere Docker runs. Decide who operates the server.

selfHost.title: Self-host
selfHost.body: Open source, runs via Docker on your own infrastructure — VPS, Proxmox/PVE, or bare metal. Set up in minutes.
bullets: Runs with a single docker compose up

managed.title: Managed by us
managed.body: We run Coworkee for you — updates, backups, and operations are on us, you just use the platform.

contact.heading: Questions? Talk to us.
contact.body: Feature request, pricing question, or just want to say hi — we reply personally.

demo.heading: A live demo, no signup form required.
demo.body: This instance runs with realistic sample data. Just log in with one of the accounts below.
